mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, seller_id, status, last_message, last_sender_type, unread_user_count, unread_admin_count, created_at, updated_at, closed_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toy_consultation (user_id, product_id, seller_id, status, last_message, last_sender_type, unread_user_count, unread_admin_count, created_at, updated_at, closed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{sellerId}, #{status}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastSenderType}, #{unreadUserCount}, #{unreadAdminCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{closedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM toy_consultation WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE toy_consultation SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_sender_type = #{lastSenderType}, unread_user_count = #{unreadUserCount}, unread_admin_count = #{unreadAdminCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
